entries.title: 托业考试（TOEIC）概述
entries.summary: 托业（TOEIC）是由美国教育考试服务中心（ETS）开发的国际商务英语能力测评，分为听说读写四项，总分990分（听读）或400分（说写）。
entries.raw:
托业（TOEIC，Test of English for International Communication）是由美国教育考试服务中心（ETS）开发的国际商务英语能力测评体系。

主要考试类型：
1. TOEIC Listening & Reading（听力+阅读）：总分990分，两部分各495分
2. TOEIC Speaking & Writing（口语+写作）：口语满分200分，写作满分200分，合并400分

适用人群：职场人士、求职者、在校学生，尤其适合需要在国际职场环境中使用英语的人群。

评分体系：听力和阅读各分5-495分，合计10-990分，以5分为单位递增。

考试频率：全球每年举办多次，中国大陆每年约举办6-10次（各地时间不同）。

entries.title: 托业听力部分（Part 1-4）详解
entries.summary: TOEIC听力共100题，分为Part 1图片描述、Part 2问答、Part 3对话、Part 4独白，考试时间约45分钟。
entries.raw:
TOEIC 听力部分（Listening Section）共100题，约45分钟：

Part 1 — 图片描述（Photographs）
- 题数：6题
- 形式：看图选出最符合的英文描述（A/B/C/D四选一）
- 考点：名词、动词、介词短语、被动语态
- 技巧：先看图预判场景；注意排除含错误人物/动作的选项

Part 2 — 问答（Question-Response）
- 题数：25题
- 形式：听一句话或问句，选最合适的回应（A/B/C三选一）
- 考点：特殊疑问词（Who/What/When/Where/Why/How）、一般疑问句、建议/请求句
- 技巧：抓住句首疑问词；小心[间接回答]型正确选项

Part 3 — 短对话（Conversations）
- 题数：39题（13组对话，每组3题）
- 形式：听两到三人对话，答对话相关问题（有图表题）
- 考点：场景理解、说话人意图、图表与对话结合
- 技巧：提前阅读题目和选项；注意[图表题]需结合听到的信息

Part 4 — 短独白（Talks）
- 题数：30题（10段独白，每段3题）
- 形式：听广播、通知、留言等，答相关问题
- 考点：主题、细节、说话人目的、图表题
- 技巧：预读题目预判内容；注意独白开头结尾的关键信息

entries.title: 托业阅读部分（Part 5-7）详解
entries.summary: TOEIC阅读共100题，分为Part 5单句填空、Part 6短文填空、Part 7阅读理解，考试时间75分钟，需合理分配。
entries.raw:
TOEIC 阅读部分（Reading Section）共100题，75分钟（自行掌控时间）：

Part 5 — 单句填空（Incomplete Sentences）
- 题数：30题
- 形式：句子中有一个空格，四选一填入最合适的词
- 考点：词性辨析、动词时态/语态、介词、连词、代词
- 技巧：先看空格前后语境；区分词性（名词/动词/形容词/副词）；每题目标20-25秒

Part 6 — 短文填空（Text Completion）
- 题数：16题（4篇短文，每篇4空）
- 形式：邮件/通知/广告中填入词语或句子
- 考点：语法+逻辑连贯；有[整句填空]题型需理解上下文
- 技巧：先通读全文再填空；整句题必须结合上下文语境

Part 7 — 阅读理解（Reading Comprehension）
- 题数：54题
  - 单篇文章（Single Passages）：29题
  - 双篇文章（Double Passages）：10题
  - 三篇文章（Triple Passages）：15题
- 文章类型：邮件、广告、通知、报告、表格、聊天记录等
- 考点：主旨、细节、推断、词义、作者意图、交叉信息
- 技巧：先看题目再定位文章；双/三篇题注意信息在不同文章间的关联；时间紧张时优先做单篇

时间分配建议：Part 5约15分钟，Part 6约10分钟，Part 7约50分钟

entries.title: 托业分数对应及各行业参考标准
entries.summary: TOEIC 990分满分，800+分被认为具备流利商务英语能力；日企普遍要求600-730+，外资企业通常要求800+。
entries.raw:
TOEIC 听读分数参考对照：

分数段 → 能力描述：
- 905-990分：能够流利地在国际职场沟通，接近母语水平
- 785-900分：能够较流利地进行商务英语沟通，表达准确
- 605-780分：能够应付日常职场英语，偶有误解
- 405-600分：具备基础沟通能力，较复杂内容有困难
- 10-400分：基础阶段，日常简单交流有限

各场景参考要求：
- 日资企业（一般职位）：600分以上
- 日资企业（晋升/海外派遣）：730-800分以上
- 外资企业（普通职位）：700-750分以上
- 外资企业（高级职位/管理层）：850分以上
- 中国高校英语专业：参考值550-650分
- 留学申请（非英语国家高校辅助材料）：700分以上

CEFR 对应（参考）：
- C1（高阶）：约860-990
- B2（中高阶）：约730-855
- B1（中阶）：约550-725
- A2（基础）：约225-545

entries.title: 托业高频词汇分类
entries.summary: 托业核心词汇约3000-4000词，主要围绕商务、办公、人事、财务、旅行、餐饮、医疗、广告等场景展开。
entries.raw:
TOEIC 高频词汇分类（按场景）：

【办公/行政】
appoint 任命 | agenda 议程 | authorize 授权 | bulletin board 公告栏 | correspondence 往来信件 | deadline 截止日期 | delegate 委派 | facilitate 促进 | headquarters 总部 | invoice 发票 | notify 通知 | personnel 人员 | premises 场所 | priority 优先级 | procedure 程序 | schedule 安排 | submit 提交

【商务/销售】
account 账户/客户 | acquire 获取 | brochure 宣传册 | campaign 活动 | client 客户 | contract 合同 | discount 折扣 | distribute 分发 | expand 扩张 | launch 发布 | negotiate 谈判 | profit 利润 | promote 推广 | proposal 提案 | revenue 收入 | vendor 供应商

【财务/会计】
accountant 会计师 | asset 资产 | audit 审计 | balance 余额 | budget 预算 | expense 费用 | fiscal 财政的 | fund 资金 | invest 投资 | liability 负债 | overhead 间接费用 | payroll 工资单 | reimbursement 报销 | transaction 交易

【人事/招聘】
applicant 申请人 | benefit 福利 | candidate 候选人 | certificate 证书 | evaluate 评估 | hire 雇用 | interview 面试 | position 职位 | promote 晋升 | qualification 资格 | resign 辞职 | retire 退休 | supervisor 上司 | vacancy 空缺

【旅行/出差】
itinerary 行程 | accommodate 住宿 | board 登机/登船 | cancel 取消 | confirm 确认 | customs 海关 | departure 出发 | destination 目的地 | duration 持续时间 | reserve 预订 | terminal 航站楼

【医疗/健康】
appoint 预约 | clinic 诊所 | diagnose 诊断 | emergency 紧急情况 | prescription 处方 | symptom 症状 | treatment 治疗

entries.title: 托业备考策略与学习计划
entries.summary: 根据目标分数和备考时长制定学习计划：650分3个月、730分4-6个月、850+分6-12个月，需针对性强化薄弱项。
entries.raw:
TOEIC 备考策略：

一、评估现有水平
- 做一套完整模拟题（听力+阅读）了解当前分数段
- 分析错题分布：哪个Part失分最多？语法/词汇/听力哪块最弱？

二、目标分数与建议备考时长
- 目标600分（基础起步）：约2-3个月，每天1小时
- 目标730分：约3-4个月，每天1.5小时
- 目标860分：约4-6个月，每天2小时
- 目标900+（需强化全部技能）：6个月以上

三、各部分备考重点
听力：
- 每日精听：跟读Part 3/4对话，模仿语音语调
- 扩大词汇量：商务场景词汇优先
- 练习边听边记关键词的能力

阅读：
- Part 5：专项语法练习（词性、时态、介词），每天20题
- Part 6：练习整句填空，理解上下文衔接
- Part 7：提速训练，练习快速定位答案，目标每题1分钟内

四、推荐资源
- 官方资料：ETS《TOEIC官方题库》《TOEIC模拟全真题》
- 练习App：托业助手、English Central、Duolingo（辅助）
- 词汇书：《TOEIC必备词汇》《新东方TOEIC词汇》

五、考试当天技巧
- 听力：提前看题目（Part 3/4需在播音间隙快速预读）
- 阅读：严格控制各Part时间，Part 7留足时间
- 答题卡必须全部填写，不答直接0分

entries.title: 托业每日学习计划（持续打卡表）
entries.summary: 按周循环的托业每日学习时间表，每天约1.5小时，覆盖词汇、听力、语法、阅读四个模块，配合间隔重复持续复习。
entries.raw:
# 托业每日学习计划（每天约1.5小时）

## 每周循环安排

### 周一 — 词汇日
- 【20分钟】背诵新词汇：每天15-20个托业高频商务词汇（用记忆卡片或App）
- 【20分钟】Part 5 单句填空专项练习：10-15题，重点关注词性辨析
- 【20分钟】复习昨日词汇，用例句造句巩固
- 【30分钟】读一篇英文商务文章（LinkedIn/BBC Business），标记生词

### 周二 — 听力日
- 【30分钟】精听 Part 3 对话（3-4组）：先听答题，再逐句跟读模仿
- 【20分钟】Part 1/2 快速练习：10道图片题+10道问答题
- 【20分钟】听力词汇复习：专注听力场景词（机场/办公室/餐厅）
- 【20分钟】跟读练习：选一段托业对话逐句跟读，模仿语调

### 周三 — 语法日
- 【30分钟】Part 5 语法专项：15-20题，重点时态/语态/连词
- 【20分钟】Part 6 短文填空：做一篇完整文章（4道题），分析整句填空逻辑
- 【20分钟】语法笔记整理：总结本周遇到的错误语法点
- 【20分钟】词汇复习（本周新词回顾）

### 周四 — 阅读日
- 【40分钟】Part 7 阅读练习：完成2-3篇单篇+1篇双篇，计时练习
- 【20分钟】分析错题：找出错因（词汇/定位/推断）
- 【20分钟】精读一篇难度较高的文章，训练速读定位
- 【10分钟】词汇复习

### 周五 — 综合模拟日
- 【60分钟】做半套模拟题：听力100题 或 阅读100题（交替进行）
- 【30分钟】对答案+分析错题，记录薄弱点

### 周六 — 强化薄弱项
- 根据本周错题情况，集中强化最薄弱的一个Part
- 推荐：整理错题本，写下错误原因和正确思路
- 额外时间：听英语播客或商务英语视频（输入为主）

### 周日 — 轻复习+计划
- 【30分钟】复习本周所有新词汇（间隔重复）
- 【20分钟】回顾本周错题本要点
- 【10分钟】制定下周学习重点
- 休息为主，保持英语输入即可（听歌/看剧）

---

## 每日必做（每天10分钟）
- 打开托业App/词汇卡片：复习当日词汇
- 朗读5个例句（语感训练）
- 在知识库输入 `remind` 查看今日复习任务

## 进度里程碑
- 第2周末：完成一套完整模拟题，记录基准分
- 第4周末：词汇积累300+，Part 5正确率达70%+
- 第8周末：听力正确率达75%+，阅读完成率100%
- 第12周末：模拟分数达目标分数的90%，报名正式考试

## 推荐工具
- 词汇：Anki（自制托业词汇卡片）或「扇贝单词」托业词书
- 真题：ETS官方《TOEIC Listening and Reading公式問題集》
- 听力练习：每日精听App、YouTube「English with Lucy」
- 计时工具：Forest专注App（防止刷手机）

entries.title: 托业常见语法考点（Part 5重点）
entries.summary: Part 5语法题核心考点：词性辨析、动词时态语态、介词、连词、代词、比较级；掌握这些可稳拿80%以上正确率。
entries.raw:
TOEIC Part 5 核心语法考点：

1. 词性辨析（最高频）
- 同根词四选一：manage(v) / manager(n) / management(n) / managerial(adj)
- 方法：看空格在句中的语法位置：主语/宾语=名词，修饰名词=形容词，修饰动词=副词

2. 动词时态与语态
- 现在完成时：already/yet/since/for + 完成时
- 被动语态：主语是动作的承受者 → be + pp
- 常考：The report has been submitted. / The meeting was held yesterday.

3. 介词搭配
- 高频介词：in, on, at, for, by, with, during, within, throughout
- 常见错误：on time（准时）vs in time（及时）；by Friday（截止周五）vs until Friday（持续到周五）

4. 连词与连接副词
- 并列连词：and/but/or/so
- 从属连词：because/although/while/if/unless/as long as
- 连接副词（后接完整句）：however/therefore/moreover/nevertheless
- 注意：连接副词不能直接连接两个句子，需加分号或句号

5. 代词
- 主格/宾格/所有格/反身代词的区分
- 常错：Every employee should submit his or her report

6. 比较级与最高级
- 两者比较用比较级，三者及以上用最高级
- 常见句式：A is twice as + adj + as B；the + 最高级 + in/of

7. 关系代词/关系副词
- who（人，主/宾格）/ which（物）/ that（人或物）/ whose（所有格）
- where（地点从句）/ when（时间从句）/ why（原因从句）

entries.title: 托业模拟题 — Part 1 图片描述（10题）
entries.summary: Part 1图片描述模拟题10道，每题描述一个场景图片，从四个句子中选出最符合图片的描述。附答案与解析。
entries.raw:
# TOEIC Part 1 模拟题 — 图片描述（10题）

说明：每题描述一张图片场景，从(A)(B)(C)(D)中选出最符合图片的句子。

---

【题1】图片场景：一名男性正在办公桌前使用电脑，桌上有文件和咖啡杯。
(A) The man is reading a newspaper.
(B) The man is typing on a keyboard.
(C) The man is talking on the phone.
(D) The man is cleaning the desk.
✅ 答案：(B)
解析：图片显示男性在用电脑，typing on a keyboard（在键盘上打字）最符合。(A)看报纸、(C)打电话、(D)清洁桌子均与场景不符。

---

【题2】图片场景：两名女性站在会议室白板前，一人手持马克笔。
(A) The women are seated at a conference table.
(B) One of the women is writing on a whiteboard.
(C) The women are looking at a computer screen.
(D) One of the women is handing out documents.
✅ 答案：(B)
解析：手持马克笔站在白板前，writing on a whiteboard 最准确。注意(A)是坐着，图中是站立。

---

【题3】图片场景：超市货架，一名员工正在整理商品。
(A) A customer is paying at the checkout.
(B) The shelves are completely empty.
(C) A worker is stocking the shelves.
(D) Some products are being delivered.
✅ 答案：(C)
解析：stocking the shelves（补货/整理货架）准确描述员工动作。(B)货架空着与图不符。

---

【题4】图片场景：一名女性在机场候机室拉着行李箱行走。
(A) A woman is checking in her luggage at the counter.
(B) A woman is pulling a suitcase through a terminal.
(C) A woman is waiting in a queue.
(D) A woman is boarding an airplane.
✅ 答案：(B)
解析：pulling a suitcase through a terminal（在候机楼拉着行李箱）准确。(A)是托运行李，(D)是登机，均不符。

---

【题5】图片场景：户外咖啡馆，几张桌子旁有顾客坐着喝咖啡。
(A) The café is closed and empty.
(B) People are seated at outdoor tables.
(C) A waiter is taking an order.
(D) The customers are standing in line.
✅ 答案：(B)
解析：People are seated at outdoor tables（人们坐在户外桌旁）直接描述图片主要场景。

---

【题6】图片场景：建筑工地，工人戴着安全帽在铺设管道。
(A) Workers are wearing hard hats at a construction site.
(B) Workers are painting the walls of a building.
(C) A building is being demolished.
(D) Workers are planting trees near a road.
✅ 答案：(A)
解析：wearing hard hats at a construction site（在建筑工地戴安全帽）符合。(B)刷墙、(C)拆楼、(D)种树均不符。

---

【题7】图片场景：图书馆内，一名学生坐在书架旁看书。
(A) A student is returning books to the shelf.
(B) A librarian is organizing the bookshelves.
(C) A person is reading a book near some shelves.
(D) Some books are being checked out at the front desk.
✅ 答案：(C)
解析：reading a book near some shelves（在书架旁看书）最准确描述图中场景。

---

【题8】图片场景：停车场，一辆汽车正在驶入停车位。
(A) A car is being repaired in a garage.
(B) A vehicle is parking in a space.
(C) A car is driving on a highway.
(D) Two cars are involved in an accident.
✅ 答案：(B)
解析：A vehicle is parking in a space（车辆正在停入车位）准确。注意 parking 表示停入动作。

---

【题9】图片场景：餐厅厨房，厨师正在用平底锅炒菜。
(A) A chef is plating food on a dish.
(B) A cook is frying food in a pan.
(C) A chef is washing vegetables in the sink.
(D) A waiter is carrying food to a table.
✅ 答案：(B)
解析：frying food in a pan（用平底锅煎炒食物）符合图片。(A)摆盘、(C)洗菜、(D)端菜均不符。

---

【题10】图片场景：公园小路上，一名男性在慢跑，背景是树木和长椅。
(A) A man is sitting on a bench in the park.
(B) A man is jogging along a path.
(C) A man is cycling through the park.
(D) A man is walking his dog.
✅ 答案：(B)
解析：jogging along a path（沿小路慢跑）准确。(A)坐着、(C)骑车、(D)遛狗均不符。

---

## Part 1 答题技巧回顾
- 播放前：快速观察图片主体（人物/物品/地点）
- 排除法：先排除含明显错误信息的选项
- 警惕：发音相似但意思不同的词（sheet/seat, work/walk）
- 被动语态常出现：is being + pp（正在被...）

entries.title: 托业模拟题 — Part 2 问答（20题）
entries.summary: Part 2问答模拟题20道，听一句话或问句，从三个回应中选最合适的答案。涵盖特殊疑问句、一般疑问句、建议句型。附答案与解析。
entries.raw:
# TOEIC Part 2 模拟题 — 问答（20题）

说明：听一句话或问句，从(A)(B)(C)中选出最合适的回应。

---

【题1】Where is the nearest copy machine?
(A) I'll make ten copies.
(B) It's down the hall, next to the supply room.
(C) The meeting starts at nine.
✅ 答案：(B)
解析：Where 问地点，(B)给出具体位置是正确回应。(A)答复数量，(C)答复时间，均答非所问。

---

【题2】When will the quarterly report be ready?
(A) Yes, it's very important.
(B) It's about 20 pages long.
(C) Probably by Thursday afternoon.
✅ 答案：(C)
解析：When 问时间，(C)给出具体时间。(A)用 yes/no 回答 when 问句，错误；(B)答页数，不相关。

---

【题3】Who is leading the workshop tomorrow?
(A) It's in Conference Room B.
(B) Dr. Chen from the marketing department.
(C) The workshop was very informative.
✅ 答案：(B)
解析：Who 问人物，(B)给出具体人名和部门。

---

【题4】Have you reviewed the contract yet?
(A) I'm still going through it.
(B) The contract is on the third floor.
(C) Yes, the review was positive.
✅ 答案：(A)
解析：问是否已看合同，(A)「我还在看」是自然的间接否定回应，符合真题风格。

---

【题5】Could you send me the updated price list?
(A) Sure, I'll email it to you right away.
(B) The prices have gone up recently.
(C) I received it this morning.
✅ 答案：(A)
解析：Could you...? 是请求句，(A)「当然，马上发给你」是最直接的肯定回应。

---

【题6】Why hasn't the shipment arrived yet?
(A) It was shipped last Monday.
(B) There's been a delay at customs.
(C) The delivery address is correct.
✅ 答案：(B)
解析：Why 问原因，(B)「海关延误」给出具体原因。(A)说明发货时间，不是原因。

---

【题7】How many people attended the conference?
(A) It was held at the convention center.
(B) The conference lasted two days.
(C) About three hundred participants.
✅ 答案：(C)
解析：How many 问数量，(C)给出具体人数。

---

【题8】Is the new software compatible with our system?
(A) Our IT team is checking it now.
(B) The software was developed in-house.
(C) Yes, the system is very efficient.
✅ 答案：(A)
解析：问是否兼容，(A)「IT团队正在检查」是合理的间接回应，表示尚未确认。真题喜欢这类间接答案。

---

【题9】Shouldn't we reschedule the client meeting?
(A) The client was very satisfied.
(B) I already moved it to Friday.
(C) Meetings are held every Monday.
✅ 答案：(B)
解析：提议改期，(B)「已经改到周五了」直接回应了这个提议。

---

【题10】Where should I submit the expense report?
(A) To the accounting department on the second floor.
(B) Yes, it needs to be submitted.
(C) The expenses were within budget.
✅ 答案：(A)
解析：Where 问提交地点，(A)给出具体部门和楼层。

---

【题11】How long does it take to process a refund?
(A) We only process cash refunds.
(B) Usually five to seven business days.
(C) The refund was approved yesterday.
✅ 答案：(B)
解析：How long 问时间长度，(B)给出具体天数。

---

【题12】Did Mr. Park call while I was out?
(A) I'll call him back later.
(B) Yes, he left a message for you.
(C) He works in the Seoul branch.
✅ 答案：(B)
解析：一般疑问句，(B)用 yes 回应并提供额外信息（留了留言）。

---

【题13】What time does the bank close on Fridays?
(A) It's right across the street.
(B) I think it closes at five o'clock.
(C) They're open on weekends, too.
✅ 答案：(B)
解析：What time 问时间，(B)给出关闭时间。

---

【题14】Would you like me to book a hotel for the conference?
(A) That would be very helpful, thank you.
(B) The hotel is fully booked.
(C) The conference will be in Chicago.
✅ 答案：(A)
解析：Would you like me to...? 是提议句，(A)「那就太好了，谢谢」是接受提议的回应。

---

【题15】Why was the project deadline extended?
(A) We need more time to finalize the design.
(B) The deadline is next Friday.
(C) The project team worked very hard.
✅ 答案：(A)
解析：Why 问原因，(A)给出延期原因。

---

【题16】Has the annual budget been approved?
(A) Not yet — it's still under review.
(B) The budget was larger than expected.
(C) We submitted it last week.
✅ 答案：(A)
解析：问预算是否批准，(A)「还没有，仍在审查中」是最完整的回应。(C)说明提交了，但没回答是否批准。

---

【题17】Which printer is out of ink?
(A) The one near the reception desk.
(B) We ordered more ink cartridges.
(C) I'll print the report now.
✅ 答案：(A)
解析：Which 问哪台，(A)给出具体位置。

---

【题18】Do you know when Ms. Torres will be back from her trip?
(A) She traveled to Singapore.
(B) She's expected back on Wednesday.
(C) Her trip was very successful.
✅ 答案：(B)
解析：问何时回来，(B)给出预计返回时间。

---

【题19】Aren't you joining us for the team lunch?
(A) I have a client call at noon, unfortunately.
(B) The lunch menu looks great.
(C) Yes, the restaurant is nearby.
✅ 答案：(A)
解析：否定疑问句，(A)给出无法参加的理由，是真实、自然的回应。

---

【题20】How did the product launch go?
(A) The launch was delayed by a week.
(B) Better than expected — sales were strong.
(C) We're launching a new product line.
✅ 答案：(B)
解析：How did...go? 问结果/进展，(B)给出具体评价（超出预期，销售强劲）。

---

## Part 2 答题技巧
- 抓住句首疑问词（Who/What/When/Where/Why/How）
- 警惕「回声陷阱」：选项中重复题目的词汇往往是干扰项
- 正确答案常是「间接回应」，不一定有yes/no
- 三个选项中，两个通常是明显错误，聚焦排除

entries.title: 托业模拟题 — Part 3 短对话（3组·9题）
entries.summary: Part 3短对话模拟3组对话，每组3题，场景涵盖办公室安排、出差预订、项目讨论。附脚本、题目、答案与解析。
entries.raw:
# TOEIC Part 3 模拟题 — 短对话（3组·9题）

说明：听两人对话，回答每组3个问题。

---

## 对话一：办公室日程安排

**对话脚本：**
W: David, have you confirmed the meeting room for Thursday's presentation?
M: I tried to book Room 204, but it's already reserved. I'm checking if Room 301 on the third floor is available.
W: I hope it works out. We need a room that can accommodate at least 30 people.
M: Room 301 holds up to 40, so that should be fine. I'll let you know by the end of the day.

**Q1.** What is the man trying to do?
(A) Cancel a presentation
(B) Reserve a meeting room
(C) Contact a client
(D) Reschedule a conference
✅ 答案：(B)
解析：男士说 I tried to book Room 204...I'm checking if Room 301 is available，可知他在预约会议室。

**Q2.** Why can't the man use Room 204?
(A) It is too small.
(B) It is being renovated.
(C) It has already been booked.
(D) It does not have the right equipment.
✅ 答案：(C)
解析：男士说 it's already reserved（已被预订），对应 already been booked。

**Q3.** What does the woman say about the room?
(A) It should fit at least 30 people.
(B) It must be on the second floor.
(C) It needs to have a projector.
(D) It should be reserved by noon.
✅ 答案：(A)
解析：女士说 We need a room that can accommodate at least 30 people。

---

## 对话二：出差机票预订

**对话脚本：**
M: Hi, I need to book a flight to New York for next Tuesday. It's for a business trip.
W: Certainly. Would you prefer a morning or afternoon departure?
M: Morning would be better. I have a client meeting at two o'clock in the afternoon.
W: There's a direct flight at 7:45 A.M. that arrives at 11:20 A.M. That should give you plenty of time.
M: Perfect. Please book that one, and I'll also need a return flight on Thursday evening.

**Q4.** Why is the man traveling to New York?
(A) To attend a training session
(B) To meet with a client
(C) To visit the company headquarters
(D) To give a presentation
✅ 答案：(B)
解析：男士说 I have a client meeting at two o'clock，目的是见客户。

**Q5.** What time does the morning flight depart?
(A) 7:15 A.M.
(B) 7:45 A.M.
(C) 11:20 A.M.
(D) 2:00 P.M.
✅ 答案：(B)
解析：女士说 There's a direct flight at 7:45 A.M.。

**Q6.** When does the man want to return?
(A) Tuesday evening
(B) Wednesday morning
(C) Thursday evening
(D) Friday afternoon
✅ 答案：(C)
解析：男士说 I'll also need a return flight on Thursday evening。

---

## 对话三：项目进度讨论

**对话脚本：**
W: Jason, how is the website redesign project coming along? The client is asking for an update.
M: We've finished the homepage and the product pages. We're still working on the checkout section — it's more complex than we anticipated.
W: Is there any risk of missing the deadline? It's two weeks from now.
M: It's tight, but I think we can make it if we bring in one more developer to help with the checkout feature.
W: Okay, I'll approve the additional resource. Please send me a progress report by Wednesday.

**Q7.** What project are they discussing?
(A) A marketing campaign
(B) A mobile app development
(C) A website redesign
(D) A product launch event
✅ 答案：(C)
解析：女士说 the website redesign project，直接点明项目类型。

**Q8.** What part of the project is still unfinished?
(A) The homepage
(B) The product pages
(C) The checkout section
(D) The company profile page
✅ 答案：(C)
解析：男士说 We're still working on the checkout section。homepage 和 product pages 已完成。

**Q9.** What does the woman agree to do?
(A) Extend the project deadline
(B) Contact the client directly
(C) Approve an additional developer
(D) Review the progress report immediately
✅ 答案：(C)
解析：女士说 I'll approve the additional resource，resource 指男士提到的 one more developer。

---

## Part 3 答题技巧
- 播音前：快速预读3道题目和选项，预判对话场景
- 边听边记：场所、人物关系、问题/需求、结果
- 图表题：先看图表，听时注意数字/名称与图表的对应
- 最后一题常问「接下来会做什么」，注意对话结尾

entries.title: 托业模拟题 — Part 4 短独白（3段·9题）
entries.summary: Part 4短独白模拟3段，含电话留言、广播通知、公司内部公告，每段3题，附脚本、答案与详细解析。
entries.raw:
# TOEIC Part 4 模拟题 — 短独白（3段·9题）

说明：听一段独白，回答3个问题。

---

## 独白一：电话留言

**脚本：**
Hi, this is Sarah Mitchell calling from Greenfield Consulting. I'm calling for Mr. Anderson regarding the proposal we submitted last Friday. We'd like to schedule a meeting to discuss the details and answer any questions you might have. I'm available Tuesday or Wednesday afternoon this week. Please call me back at 555-0192. Thank you.

**Q1.** Who is leaving the message?
(A) A job applicant
(B) A company consultant
(C) A hotel receptionist
(D) A new employee
✅ 答案：(B)
解析：说话人说 from Greenfield Consulting（来自咨询公司），身份是顾问。

**Q2.** Why is she calling?
(A) To confirm a job interview
(B) To follow up on a submitted proposal
(C) To change a meeting location
(D) To request additional documents
✅ 答案：(B)
解析：她说 regarding the proposal we submitted last Friday，目的是跟进上周提交的提案。

**Q3.** When is she available to meet?
(A) Monday or Tuesday
(B) Tuesday or Wednesday afternoon
(C) Thursday or Friday morning
(D) Any day this week
✅ 答案：(B)
解析：她说 I'm available Tuesday or Wednesday afternoon this week。

---

## 独白二：机场广播

**脚本：**
Attention passengers on Flight KA 271 to Singapore. This is an announcement from the gate agent. Due to a technical issue with the aircraft, your flight will be delayed by approximately two hours. The new departure time is 4:30 P.M. We apologize for the inconvenience. Complimentary meal vouchers are available at the customer service desk near Gate 12. Please remain in the gate area and listen for further announcements. Thank you for your patience.

**Q4.** What is the announcement about?
(A) A flight cancellation
(B) A gate change
(C) A flight delay
(D) A boarding call
✅ 答案：(C)
解析：广播说 your flight will be delayed by approximately two hours，是延误公告。

**Q5.** What caused the delay?
(A) Bad weather conditions
(B) A problem with the plane
(C) Air traffic congestion
(D) A crew shortage
✅ 答案：(B)
解析：说 Due to a technical issue with the aircraft（飞机技术故障），对应 A problem with the plane。

**Q6.** What are passengers offered?
(A) Hotel accommodations
(B) Flight upgrade vouchers
(C) Free meal vouchers
(D) Refund forms
✅ 答案：(C)
解析：说 Complimentary meal vouchers are available（提供免费餐券）。

---

## 独白三：公司内部公告

**脚本：**
Good morning, everyone. This is a reminder about the office renovation scheduled for next weekend. The renovation will affect the third and fourth floors. During this time, employees on those floors should temporarily relocate to the open workspace on the second floor. Please remove all personal items from your desks before you leave on Friday. The renovation is expected to be completed by Sunday evening, so normal operations will resume on Monday morning. If you have any questions, please contact the facilities management team.

**Q7.** What is the main topic of this announcement?
(A) A new office policy
(B) An upcoming building renovation
(C) A change in work schedules
(D) A fire safety drill
✅ 答案：(B)
解析：公告主题是 office renovation scheduled for next weekend。

**Q8.** Which floors will be affected?
(A) The first and second floors
(B) The second and third floors
(C) The third and fourth floors
(D) The fourth and fifth floors
✅ 答案：(C)
解析：说 The renovation will affect the third and fourth floors。

**Q9.** What are employees asked to do before Friday?
(A) Submit a relocation request form
(B) Complete a safety inspection
(C) Move their personal belongings
(D) Contact the IT department
✅ 答案：(C)
解析：说 Please remove all personal items from your desks before you leave on Friday，即搬走私人物品。

---

## Part 4 答题技巧
- 独白开头一般说明场景（广播/通知/留言/演讲），快速判断类型
- 第一题常问「What is the purpose / main topic?」— 注意开头句
- 数字/时间/地点是高频考点，听时重点标记
- 最后一题常问「What are listeners asked to do?」— 注意独白结尾的指令句

entries.title: 托业模拟题 — Part 5 单句填空（30题）
entries.summary: Part 5单句填空模拟题30道，覆盖词性辨析、时态语态、介词、连词、代词等核心语法点，每题附答案与解析。
entries.raw:
# TOEIC Part 5 模拟题 — 单句填空（30题）

说明：从(A)(B)(C)(D)中选出最适合填入空格的词。

---

1. The ------- of the new product will take place at the annual trade show next month.
(A) launch (B) launching (C) launched (D) launches
✅ 答案：(A) launch
解析：The + _____ 空格处需要名词作主语，launch（名词：发布）正确。launching 也是名词但较少用于此结构。

---

2. All employees are required to submit their timesheets ------- the end of each Friday.
(A) in (B) on (C) by (D) until
✅ 答案：(C) by
解析：by + 时间点 = 截止到某时间点（deadline），until 表示持续状态到某时间。submit by Friday = 周五前提交。

---

3. The financial report was ------- reviewed by the board of directors before the announcement.
(A) care (B) careful (C) carefully (D) carefulness
✅ 答案：(C) carefully
解析：修饰动词 reviewed 需要副词，carefully（仔细地）正确。

---

4. Ms. Kim ------- the department for over ten years before she was promoted to director.
(A) manages (B) has managed (C) had managed (D) will manage
✅ 答案：(C) had managed
解析：before 连接两个过去动作，较早发生的用过去完成时（had + pp）。被提升（was promoted）是过去，管理部门更早，用 had managed。

---

5. The new regulations require that all vendors ------- a valid business license.
(A) submit (B) submits (C) submitted (D) submitting
✅ 答案：(A) submit
解析：require that + 主语 + (should) + 动词原形（虚拟语气）。

---

6. The marketing team was ------- impressed by the results of the consumer survey.
(A) exception (B) exceptional (C) exceptionally (D) except
✅ 答案：(C) exceptionally
解析：修饰形容词 impressed 需要副词，exceptionally（异常地）正确。

---

7. The conference room is available ------- Tuesday and Thursday afternoons.
(A) between (B) during (C) on (D) at
✅ 答案：(C) on
解析：on + 具体星期几（on Tuesday / on Thursday）。列举两个具体日期用 on。

---

8. ------- the bad weather, the outdoor ceremony went ahead as planned.
(A) Although (B) Despite (C) However (D) Because of
✅ 答案：(B) Despite
解析：Despite + 名词短语（the bad weather）表示尽管。Although 后接从句（主语+动词）。

---

9. Please send the invoice to ------- is responsible for accounts payable.
(A) who (B) whom (C) whoever (D) whomever
✅ 答案：(C) whoever
解析：send to + 宾语从句，从句中 whoever 作主语（is responsible），whoever = the person who。

---

10. The project was completed ------- schedule, which impressed the client greatly.
(A) ahead of (B) instead of (C) in addition to (D) as well as
✅ 答案：(A) ahead of
解析：ahead of schedule = 提前完成（固定搭配）。

---

11. The new hiring policy will be ------- effect starting next month.
(A) on (B) in (C) at (D) with
✅ 答案：(B) in
解析：in effect = 生效（固定搭配）。come into effect / be in effect。

---

12. ------- applicants must complete an online assessment before the interview.
(A) All (B) Every (C) Each (D) Any
✅ 答案：(A) All
解析：All + 复数名词（applicants）。Every/Each + 单数名词。Any 语义不同（任何一个）。

---

13. The company has decided to ------- its operations to three new cities.
(A) expand (B) expansion (C) expanding (D) expansive
✅ 答案：(A) expand
解析：decided to + 动词原形，expand（扩展）正确。

---

14. The seminar will be held ------- Monday, April 15, ------- 9 A.M. to 5 P.M.
(A) on / from (B) in / between (C) at / from (D) on / between
✅ 答案：(A) on / from
解析：on + 具体日期，from A to B 表示时间范围。

---

15. We need someone ------- has experience in international logistics.
(A) who (B) which (C) what (D) whose
✅ 答案：(A) who
解析：先行词是 someone（人），关系代词用 who。

---

16. The survey results indicate that customer ------- has improved significantly this quarter.
(A) satisfy (B) satisfied (C) satisfying (D) satisfaction
✅ 答案：(D) satisfaction
解析：that 引导的宾语从句需要主语，customer satisfaction（客户满意度）是名词短语。

---

17. Employees ------- work more than 40 hours per week are entitled to overtime pay.
(A) who (B) which (C) what (D) they
✅ 答案：(A) who
解析：先行词是 Employees（人），定语从句用 who。

---

18. The company ------- a new environmental policy last year to reduce carbon emissions.
(A) adopts (B) adopted (C) will adopt (D) has adopted
✅ 答案：(B) adopted
解析：last year 是明确的过去时间标志，用一般过去时。

---

19. The budget proposal must be submitted ------- than next Wednesday.
(A) no late (B) no later (C) not lately (D) no latest
✅ 答案：(B) no later
解析：no later than = 不晚于（截止时间），固定搭配。

---

20. ------- attending the trade show must register online in advance.
(A) Those (B) They (C) Them (D) Their
✅ 答案：(A) Those
解析：Those + 分词短语作主语，Those attending = 参加的人们。

---

21. The ------- of the merger was announced at a press conference this morning.
(A) complete (B) completing (C) completed (D) completion
✅ 答案：(D) completion
解析：The + _____ 需要名词，completion（完成）正确。

---

22. Please be aware that parking in this area is ------- to permit holders only.
(A) restrict (B) restricts (C) restricted (D) restrictive
✅ 答案：(C) restricted
解析：be + 过去分词 = 被动状态，restricted to（仅限于）是固定搭配。

---

23. The CEO emphasized that teamwork is ------- to the company's continued success.
(A) essence (B) essential (C) essentially (D) essentials
✅ 答案：(B) essential
解析：be + _____ 需要形容词作表语，essential to（对...至关重要）固定搭配。

---

24. We will proceed with the renovation ------- we receive approval from the building management.
(A) since (B) unless (C) once (D) despite
✅ 答案：(C) once
解析：once = 一旦...就...（条件时间状语从句）。unless = 除非（否定条件），语义不符。

---

25. The director asked ------- to present the findings at the board meeting.
(A) I (B) my (C) me (D) mine
✅ 答案：(C) me
解析：asked + 宾语 + to do，宾语用宾格 me。

---

26. The ------- for the position include a bachelor's degree and five years of experience.
(A) qualify (B) qualified (C) qualification (D) qualifications
✅ 答案：(D) qualifications
解析：The + _____ 需要名词，且动词是 include（复数），用复数名词 qualifications（资历/要求）。

---

27. The new employee ------- to the office two hours before anyone else arrived.
(A) comes (B) came (C) has come (D) will come
✅ 答案：(B) came
解析：before anyone else arrived 是过去时语境，用一般过去时 came。

---

28. The manager suggested ------- the meeting to accommodate overseas participants.
(A) postpone (B) postponing (C) to postpone (D) postponed
✅ 答案：(B) postponing
解析：suggest + doing（动名词），不接不定式。

---

29. The factory operates ------- capacity during the peak holiday season.
(A) at full (B) in full (C) on full (D) by full
✅ 答案：(A) at full
解析：at full capacity = 满负荷运作（固定搭配）。

---

30. ------- the increase in raw material costs, the company managed to maintain its profit margins.
(A) In spite of (B) So that (C) As long as (D) In order to
✅ 答案：(A) In spite of
解析：In spite of + 名词短语（the increase），表示尽管。So that/As long as/In order to 后接从句或不符合语义。

entries.title: 托业模拟题 — Part 6 短文填空（2篇·8题）
entries.summary: Part 6短文填空模拟2篇文章，包含邮件和通知，每篇4道填空题，含整句填空题型，附答案与解析。
entries.raw:
# TOEIC Part 6 模拟题 — 短文填空（2篇·8题）

---

## 文章一：商务邮件

Subject: Upcoming Staff Training Session

Dear All,

I am writing to inform you about the mandatory training session scheduled for all full-time employees. The training will be held on Friday, April 18, from 10:00 A.M. to 3:00 P.M. in Conference Room A.

The session will cover updates to our data security protocols and the new expense reporting system. Attendance is __(1)__ for all permanent staff members. Temporary and contract workers are welcome to attend but are not required to do so.

Please note that lunch will be __(2)__. A light buffet will be set up in the adjoining room from 12:30 P.M. to 1:30 P.M.

__(3)__. If you are unable to attend due to a scheduling conflict, please notify your supervisor and Human Resources at least 48 hours in advance.

For further information, please contact the HR department at hr@globalcorp.com.

Best regards,
Human Resources Department

---

**Q1.** (A) optional (B) mandatory (C) voluntary (D) flexible
✅ 答案：(B) mandatory
解析：前文说 mandatory training，后文说 Temporary workers are not required（不需要），形成对比，permanent staff 是必须参加 → mandatory（强制的）。

**Q2.** (A) provided (B) required (C) scheduled (D) reserved
✅ 答案：(A) provided
解析：lunch will be provided（午餐将会提供），后接 A light buffet will be set up，语义连贯。

**Q3.** 整句填空
(A) The training will focus on improving customer service skills.
(B) We appreciate your cooperation in attending this important session.
(C) The HR department will send a follow-up email with more details.
(D) Additional training sessions may be scheduled upon request.
✅ 答案：(B)
解析：该句放在「请提前通知」之前，(B)「感谢配合参加这次重要培训」作为总结性请求语句，衔接最自然。

**Q4.** （附加题）What is NOT mentioned about the training?
(A) The date and time
(B) The topics to be covered
(C) The cost of attendance
(D) The location
✅ 答案：(C)
解析：邮件提到了时间(April 18, 10-3pm)、主题(data security, expense reporting)、地点(Conference Room A)，但未提及费用。

---

## 文章二：公司内部通知

NOTICE TO ALL STAFF
Re: Office Parking Policy Update

Effective May 1, the company will be __(5)__ a new parking permit system for all employees.

Under the new policy, employees must display a valid parking permit on their vehicle's dashboard at all times while parked on company premises. Permits will be __(6)__ on a first-come, first-served basis and must be renewed annually.

To apply for a permit, please complete the online form available on the company intranet and submit it to the Facilities Department by April 25. __(7)__.

Employees who park without a valid permit will be subject to a fine of $50 per violation. The company reserves the right to tow vehicles that are repeatedly found in violation of this policy.

We appreciate your __(8)__ with this new policy.

Facilities Management

---

**Q5.** (A) implementing (B) considering (C) reviewing (D) removing
✅ 答案：(A) implementing
解析：Effective May 1 + will be implementing a new system = 即将实施新制度，implementing（实施）符合语境。

**Q6.** (A) distributed (B) issued (C) collected (D) returned
✅ 答案：(B) issued
解析：permits will be issued（证件将被发放），issue a permit 是固定搭配。

**Q7.** 整句填空
(A) Late applications will not be accepted after the deadline.
(B) The parking lot will be closed for maintenance next week.
(C) Employees may park in the visitor area temporarily.
(D) The new system will reduce commuting time significantly.
✅ 答案：(A)
解析：紧接申请截止日期（April 25）之后，(A)「截止后不接受申请」是对截止日期的补充说明，逻辑最连贯。

**Q8.** (A) compliance (B) complaint (C) competition (D) completion
✅ 答案：(A) compliance
解析：appreciate your compliance with this new policy（感谢遵守新政策），compliance with policy 是固定搭配。

---

## Part 6 答题技巧
- 先通读全文，了解整体语境，再逐题填写
- 词汇题：注意上下文语义和词性
- 整句填空题：需判断该句在段落中的逻辑位置（承上/启下/总结）
- 时态一致性：注意全文时态基调（is / will be / was）

entries.title: 托业模拟题 — Part 7 阅读理解（单篇2篇·双篇1组·10题）
entries.summary: Part 7阅读理解模拟，含2篇单篇（邮件+广告）和1组双篇（邀请函+回复邮件），共10道题，附答案与解析。
entries.raw:
# TOEIC Part 7 模拟题 — 阅读理解

---

## 单篇一：内部邮件

From: Marcus Webb <m.webb@nexustech.com>
To: All Staff <allstaff@nexustech.com>
Date: March 12
Subject: Relocation of IT Support Desk

Dear Team,

I would like to inform you that the IT Support Desk will be relocating from Room 105 to Room 212 on the second floor, effective March 20.

This move is part of our office reorganization initiative aimed at consolidating all support services on one floor. The new location will allow the IT team to work more closely with the HR and Accounting departments, which will improve response times for cross-departmental requests.

During the relocation period (March 18-19), the IT Support Desk will be temporarily unavailable. For urgent technical issues during this time, please email itsupport@nexustech.com or call the helpline at extension 400.

From March 20 onward, all IT support requests should be directed to Room 212. The new room features improved workstations and a dedicated meeting area for one-on-one consultations.

Thank you for your understanding.

Marcus Webb
Director of Operations

---

**Q1.** What is the purpose of this email?
(A) To announce a new IT support policy
(B) To notify staff about the relocation of a department
(C) To introduce a new IT director
(D) To request feedback on office facilities
✅ 答案：(B)
解析：邮件主旨是 the IT Support Desk will be relocating，通知部门搬迁。

**Q2.** When will the IT Support Desk be unavailable?
(A) March 12 and 13
(B) March 18 and 19
(C) March 20 and 21
(D) March 18 and 20
✅ 答案：(B)
解析：邮件说 During the relocation period (March 18-19), the IT Support Desk will be temporarily unavailable。

**Q3.** What is indicated about Room 212?
(A) It is larger than Room 105.
(B) It has updated equipment and a consultation area.
(C) It is shared with the Finance Department.
(D) It was recently renovated.
✅ 答案：(B)
解析：邮件说 The new room features improved workstations and a dedicated meeting area for one-on-one consultations。

**Q4.** How should employees contact IT support during the move?
(A) By visiting Room 105
(B) By submitting an online request form
(C) By emailing or calling the helpline
(D) By speaking directly with Marcus Webb
✅ 答案：(C)
解析：邮件说 please email itsupport@nexustech.com or call the helpline at extension 400。

---

## 单篇二：招聘广告

JOB OPENING: Senior Account Manager
Location: Chicago, IL | Full-time | Posted: April 1

About Us:
BrightWave Solutions is a leading provider of digital marketing services with over 500 clients across North America. We are expanding our team and looking for a motivated Senior Account Manager to join our Chicago office.

Responsibilities:
• Manage a portfolio of 20-30 key client accounts
• Develop and present marketing strategies tailored to client needs
• Coordinate with internal creative and analytics teams
• Achieve and exceed quarterly revenue targets

Requirements:
• Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Business, or a related field
• Minimum 5 years of account management experience
• Proven track record of meeting sales targets
• Excellent communication and presentation skills
• Proficiency in CRM software (Salesforce preferred)

Compensation: $85,000 – $100,000 annually, plus performance bonuses
Benefits: Health insurance, 401(k), 15 days paid vacation

To apply, send your resume and cover letter to careers@brightwave.com by April 30.

---

**Q5.** What type of company is BrightWave Solutions?
(A) A financial consulting firm
(B) A digital marketing agency
(C) A software development company
(D) A staffing and recruitment agency
✅ 答案：(B)
解析：广告说 a leading provider of digital marketing services。

**Q6.** What is a requirement for the position?
(A) An advanced degree in computer science
(B) Experience working in Chicago
(C) At least five years of account management
(D) Proficiency in three or more languages
✅ 答案：(C)
解析：Requirements 中列明 Minimum 5 years of account management experience。

**Q7.** What should applicants do to be considered for the position?
(A) Call the HR department
(B) Submit a resume and cover letter by email
(C) Complete an online application form
(D) Attend a job fair on April 30
✅ 答案：(B)
解析：广告说 send your resume and cover letter to careers@brightwave.com by April 30。

---

## 双篇：会议邀请 + 回复邮件

**文章一：邀请函**

From: Olivia Grant <o.grant@globalforum.org>
To: Raymond Choi <r.choi@techvision.com>
Date: February 5
Subject: Speaking Invitation — Global Innovation Forum 2026

Dear Mr. Choi,

On behalf of the Global Innovation Forum, I am pleased to invite you to be a keynote speaker at our annual event, to be held on March 22 in San Francisco.

Given your expertise in AI-driven business solutions, we believe your insights would be highly valuable to our audience of approximately 800 industry professionals. We are proposing a 30-minute presentation followed by a 15-minute Q&A session.

We would cover your travel and accommodation expenses. Please let me know if you are available and interested by February 15.

Warm regards,
Olivia Grant
Event Coordinator, Global Innovation Forum

---

**文章二：回复邮件**

From: Raymond Choi <r.choi@techvision.com>
To: Olivia Grant <o.grant@globalforum.org>
Date: February 10
Subject: RE: Speaking Invitation — Global Innovation Forum 2026

Dear Ms. Grant,

Thank you for the kind invitation. I am honored to be considered for this opportunity and would be happy to participate as a keynote speaker.

I am available on March 22 and am comfortable with the proposed format. However, I would like to request a slightly extended presentation time of 40 minutes, as the topic I have in mind covers several complex areas.

Regarding travel arrangements, I will coordinate directly with your team on flight and hotel preferences.

Looking forward to the event.

Best regards,
Raymond Choi
CEO, TechVision Inc.

---

**Q8.** Why is Mr. Choi being invited to the forum?
(A) He is a major sponsor of the event.
(B) He is an expert in AI business applications.
(C) He is a previous keynote speaker.
(D) He is a board member of the organization.
✅ 答案：(B)
解析：邀请函说 Given your expertise in AI-driven business solutions。

**Q9.** What does Mr. Choi request?
(A) A higher speaker fee
(B) More time for his presentation
(C) A different event date
(D) An online participation option
✅ 答案：(B)
解析：Mr. Choi 说 I would like to request a slightly extended presentation time of 40 minutes（希望延长到40分钟，原来是30分钟）。

**Q10.** What will Mr. Choi do regarding travel?
(A) Book his own flights and accommodations
(B) Arrange travel with the event team
(C) Travel with other speakers from his company
(D) Decline the travel expense offer
✅ 答案：(B)
解析：Mr. Choi 说 I will coordinate directly with your team on flight and hotel preferences（直接与团队协调旅行安排）。

---

## Part 7 答题技巧
- 先读题目，再带着问题定位文章（不要全文通读后才看题）
- 单篇：主旨题看开头，细节题定位关键词所在段落
- 双篇/三篇：注意哪些信息在文章1，哪些在文章2，交叉类题目需两篇结合
- NOT/EXCEPT 题型：需逐项验证，选出文中未提及的
